mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, level, sort_order, enabled, guest_visible, display_type, created_at FROM app_notice WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_notice
title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%')
SELECT id, title, content, level, sort_order, enabled, guest_visible, display_type, created_at FROM app_notice WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO app_notice (title, content, level, sort_order, enabled, guest_visible, display_type) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, COALESCE(#{level}, 'info'), COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), COALESCE(#{enabled}, 1), COALESCE(#{guestVisible}, 1), COALESCE(#{displayType}, 'inbox') )
mapper.update: UPDATE app_notice SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, level = COALESCE(#{level}, 'info'), sort_order = COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), enabled = COALESCE(#{enabled}, 1), guest_visible = COALESCE(#{guestVisible}, 1), display_type = COALESCE(#{displayType}, 'inbox') WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, content, level, sort_order, enabled, guest_visible, display_type, created_at FROM app_notice WHERE enabled = 1 ORDER BY sort_order DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
